data: DOW stocks 2018-2022, 3 tiers: demo(5), standard(8), full(12); risk aversion q=0.5
method: Markowitz mean-variance optimization (continuous weights via quadratic programming) + brute-force binary enumeration (exact for comparison)
limitations: Markowitz gives continuous-weight optimal (reference frontier); brute-force binary enumeration is the exact ground truth for QUBO comparison (exponential, feasible n<=~15). 2018-2022 historical data, not forward-looking.
